allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: use admin@admin.com as default admin email *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: CORS preflight + dynamic origin whitelist *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: sanitize FRONTEND_URL to remove quotes/spaces causing invalid header *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: trust proxy for Render + rate-limit X-Forwarded-For *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove duplicate email index warning *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add /api/seed route to create admin without shell *)
